summary: Inline Card Form and AI Identification features tested. All 7 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified: inline add form (no modal), edit form with pre-filled data, back/cancel navigation, multi-select List on eBay flow. AI card identification endpoint tested successfully using existing inventory image.

issues: Chart dimension warnings in console (non-critical, likely from recharts)
HTML hydration warnings about span inside option/select (non-critical)

passed_tests: BACKEND - GET /api/inventory returns items with correct structure
BACKEND - Inventory items have required fields (id, card_name, condition)
BACKEND - POST /api/inventory creates a new card successfully
BACKEND - POST /api/inventory with minimal fields (just card_name) works
BACKEND - POST /api/cards/identify endpoint exists
BACKEND - POST /api/cards/identify with image returns card identification data
BACKEND - GET /api/inventory/stats returns statistics
FRONTEND - Add button opens INLINE form (not modal)
FRONTEND - No modal/dialog overlay detected when adding card
FRONTEND - Form has back button (data-testid=form-back-btn)
FRONTEND - Form has category buttons (Collection/For Sale)
FRONTEND - Form has image upload area (data-testid=image-upload-area)
FRONTEND - Form has all required fields: card_name, player, year, set, card_number, variation, condition, price, quantity, notes
FRONTEND - Form has cancel button (data-testid=form-cancel-btn)
FRONTEND - Form has save button (data-testid=save-card-btn)
FRONTEND - Filling form and clicking save creates card and returns to inventory
FRONTEND - New card appears in inventory list after save
FRONTEND - Edit button on card opens inline edit form
FRONTEND - Edit form shows 'Edit Card' title
FRONTEND - Edit form pre-fills with existing card data
FRONTEND - Back button from edit form returns to inventory list
FRONTEND - Select mode button enters multi-select mode
FRONTEND - Clicking card in select mode selects it
FRONTEND - List on eBay button shows selection count
FRONTEND - Clicking List on eBay opens CreateListingView
FRONTEND - Back from CreateListingView returns to inventory
critical_code_review_comments: Inline form correctly replaces modal - CardFormView renders inside InventoryList, not in a dialog overlay
AI identification endpoint uses emergentintegrations library with gpt-4o correctly
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Form correctly handles both add and edit modes with dynamic title
Edit form pre-fills all fields from inventory item data
Multi-select and List on eBay flow still works after inline form changes
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted 'Test Card 2026' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inline card form feature fully tested. CardFormView replaces CardFormModal. Key data-testid: card-form-view, form-back-btn, image-upload-area, input-card-name, input-player, input-year, input-set, input-card-number, input-variation, select-condition, input-price, input-quantity, input-notes, save-card-btn, form-cancel-btn, category-collection, category-for_sale. AI identify endpoint: POST /api/cards/identify with {image_base64: string}. Currently 1 inventory item: 1999 SkyBox APEX Kobe Bryant #4.
